site.title: Under the Hood
site.subtitle: From agent operator to agent engineer
site.promise: Read any Python, YAML, or agent-framework code without it feeling foreign — and know exactly how the machines you already drive are built.

acts.theme: Python, read fluently — the alphabet of everything that follows
